backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a driving school app defining data types (Course, TeamMember, StudentRecord, etc.) and initializing access control, blob storage, and default course/content data for a BRTA-approved driving school in Bangladesh.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that Habibur Rahman Babul's team photo was replaced with a real portrait image saved at `frontend/public/assets/generated/habibur-rahman-babul.png`, with references updated in AboutPage.tsx and HomePage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a build-planning reference for the driving school React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO metadata (Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data, geo tags) for Shambhugonj Driving School, targeting Bengali-language search and local business discovery in Mymensingh, Bangladesh.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, provides a bilingual LanguageContext (bn/en), and wraps the app in React Query and a shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/AdmissionForm.ts: Bengali-language admission inquiry form component that collects name, phone, address, course selection, and message, then submits to the backend actor via `submitRegistrationInquiry` with loading and success states.
frontend/src/components/ApprovalBadge.ts: Renders a government approval badge in two variants ('compact' pill or 'full' card) displaying the school's registration number with a shield icon.
frontend/src/components/FacebookCtaButto: A styled anchor button component that links to the school's Facebook page with a configurable href and label.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the school's brand, registration info, social media links (WhatsApp, Facebook, YouTube, TikTok), quick navigation links, contact details, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/GovernmentSealBa: Renders a circular government seal badge with a shield icon, approval text in Bengali, and the registration number.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a top bar showing government approval info, a main nav with logo and school name, contact details, WhatsApp/bKash links, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/constants/contact.ts: Exports shared contact constants (Bengali address and email) as a single source of truth for use across the app.
frontend/src/data/galleryImages.ts: Exports a static array of image asset paths used to populate the gallery across the site.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching (school profile, courses, team, services, gallery, etc.) and mutating (contact form, registration inquiry) backend data via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind, sets up Bengali font families, defines an OKLCH-based color system (navy/cream/gold) with CSS custom properties for light and dark modes, and provides utility component classes like card styles and section backgrounds.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with TanStack Query, Internet Identity authentication provider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page displaying school mission, stats, feature list, and a team member grid with photos and Bengali/English names and roles.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionPage.tsx: Admission page with a header section and a styled card containing the AdmissionForm component alongside a GovernmentSealBadge.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page showing school contact details (phone, WhatsApp, address) and a form that submits messages to the ICP actor backend.
frontend/src/pages/CoursesPage.tsx: Courses page listing four driving courses (60-hour mandatory, 30-day basic, special, motorcycle) in a responsive grid with fees and feature lists.
frontend/src/pages/DrivingLicensePage.ts: Driving license services page describing four steps (learner license, smart card license, BRTA support, file processing) with icons and license sample images.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Displays a responsive image gallery grid with a lightbox viewer that supports keyboard navigation (arrow keys, escape) and zoom-in hover effects.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring a hero section, course listings, team member profiles, and a gallery preview, all styled with Bengali-language content.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Renders a pricing page with four course plan cards (car and motorcycle, basic and special), highlighting the most popular plan and linking to enrollment.
frontend/src/pages/StudentRecordsPage.ts: Admin page for managing student records with CRUD operations, search/sort, and daily/monthly report filtering with fee totals.
frontend/src/utils/studentReports.ts: Provides utility functions to filter student records by exact date or year-month, and to calculate totals for student count, paid amounts, and dues.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom font families (Bengali/Inter), a navy/cream/gold color palette with semantic tokens, border radius, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Shambhuganj Driving School' at version 3, tracking an existing feature to replace a team member's photo with a real portrait image and update all references in AboutPage.tsx and HomePage.tsx.
